mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_daily_factor_snapshot ( stock_code, trade_date, close_previous, return_1d, return_3d, return_5d, return_10d, return_20d, volatility_5d, volatility_20d, avg_amount_5d, avg_amount_20d, avg_amount_60d, daily_high_20d, daily_low_20d, position_20d, is_limit_up_near, is_limit_down_near, valid_flag, invalid_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.closePrevious}, #{item.return1d}, #{item.return3d}, #{item.return5d}, #{item.return10d}, #{item.return20d}, #{item.volatility5d}, #{item.volatility20d}, #{item.avgAmount5d}, #{item.avgAmount20d}, #{item.avgAmount60d}, #{item.dailyHigh20d}, #{item.dailyLow20d}, #{item.position20d}, #{item.isLimitUpNear}, #{item.isLimitDownNear}, #{item.validFlag}, #{item.invalidReason}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE close_previous = VALUES(close_previous), return_1d = VALUES(return_1d), return_3d = VALUES(return_3d), return_5d = VALUES(return_5d), return_10d = VALUES(return_10d), return_20d = VALUES(return_20d), volatility_5d = VALUES(volatility_5d), volatility_20d = VALUES(volatility_20d), avg_amount_5d = VALUES(avg_amount_5d), avg_amount_20d = VALUES(avg_amount_20d), avg_amount_60d = VALUES(avg_amount_60d), daily_high_20d = VALUES(daily_high_20d), daily_low_20d = VALUES(daily_low_20d), position_20d = VALUES(position_20d), is_limit_up_near = VALUES(is_limit_up_near), is_limit_down_near = VALUES(is_limit_down_near), valid_flag = VALUES(valid_flag), invalid_reason = VALUES(invalid_reason), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
